text: I absolutely love Expo and these days whatever the application we are building

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: are 100% Expo based. Our application serves thousands and thousands of active

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: user daily basis and Expo is the right way of building these days modern

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: application that can serve on Android applications as Android phones as well as

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: iPhones as well. But here's the thing

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Since I have been propagating about things, what to do, what not on YouTube for a really long time,

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: a lot of people picked up my videos and wrote articles about them and helped me to pass on the narration further on.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: And these are all based on my experience that I get.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Now, before almost, I guess in like 7 or 8 years ago, I was a big sayer of saying that

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: you need to build your application with React Native CLI.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: During those days, the expo was not a mature platform.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: And I was very right at that point. But over the years and especially in last five or seven years

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Expo has picked up really well. Now my saying is that hey you should build your application with and only with Expo

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: React Native CLI you don't need to it and there is no good reason to do so. Your performance is all good

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: your all the APIs, APK

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Everything is available within the Expo itself and you can reliably build an application and I'm building my own but here's the problem

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Since those words amplified so much that now it's getting even for me difficult to convey

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: the fact that we have new facts now.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: We need to change our perspective with the new facts now.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: And it is very hard to convince all the people.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: But here's I am saying out loud that yes, Expo is the way to build React Native application

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: or cross platform application.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: These are not hybrid applications, these are real applications which actually the code that you're writing is in JavaScript and TypeScript

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: but the applications which your platform sees are native applications in itself.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Until and unless you are making some next generation game itself, for all the other applications, Expo and React Native are the right fit to go for.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: You will never face any lag, any kind of performance issue, nothing at all. We use them every single day, we bill for clients as well.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: But there is one thing which I'm not happy about the expo and you really need to know about it

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Expo is doing everything great except marking their versioning number

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Somehow expo doesn't use the semver versioning of rolling out the updates and they roll out updates so fast that it is

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Almost impossible to catch them. In fact, their own team is finding difficulty to catch these updates

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Their own application as the time of recording of this video in the store supports the version 54

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: But their application is rolling out version 57 and there is no major difference in them

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: That is the pain point. They all are backward compatible all code works in the previous applications or previous versions

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: But still they keep on rolling. Let me show you something very interesting to prove my point apart from that

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: I love XBOW but

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Look at this. This is expo 57. They rolled out great, but where is the previous version just here it is expo 56

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Ah, so May 22 and then July

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Who rolls out version that quickly but somehow they do it

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: They never roll out versions like 56.1, 56.2, they just roll out 56, 57.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Where is 55?

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: You might be asking.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Here it is.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: February.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt
class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: And you might be seeing the same kind of pattern going up.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: If I load more, you'll see the exact same pattern.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: So, my goal before making this video is that please don't worry about the version of Xpo.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Just feel free to choose whatever is the latest version or use the version that we are using

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: in the application and you will be absolutely fine.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: There is no need of using the cutting edge because you won't be able to use it.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Their own expo go application supports version 54. So even if I want to I cannot use expo version 56 right now

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: So again, this is a little mismatch, but you don't have to worry go with little bit older version

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Which are much more stable does the job and we have also recorded in them. So this is very stable

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: So, don't worry about the entire course that hey the version is outdated or it is not.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: We have taken special care so all the code runs in all the versions, it is backward compatible

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: and rest assured we'll be keep on updating if anything new extreme happens.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: So don't worry on that.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Just only my 2 minute rant or complain that Hey Expo!

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Please use Sember versioning. Rolling out the new mega version update number

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: It gives panic to everyone in the industry, in the learner, everyone

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Hope they will listen to me soon and they still stop rolling out this 56, 57. By this speed

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: They will be on target 100 probably within few months

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Anyways, so the model of the story is - don't worry about the versioning, that is okay,

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: totally completely fine.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: We have taken care all of it.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: You will have a good experience while learning through this entire mobile development journey.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: That is it from my side.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: That's it.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Expo Version change so quickly_epm/Expo Version change so quickly_epm.vtt

text: Let's catch up in next video.
